body.processed:
Oakridge voters have overwhelmingly approved Measure 4A, an $85 million bond measure that will fund new school construction, technology upgrades, and safety improvements across the district.

"This is a tremendous vote of confidence in our schools," said Superintendent Dr. Linda Perez. "These funds will allow us to modernize our facilities and ensure every student has access to 21st-century learning environments."

Construction is expected to begin in summer 2026, with major projects completed by 2029.
body.summary: Oakridge voters have overwhelmingly approved Measure 4A, an $85 million bond measure that will fund new school construction, technology upgrades, and safety improvements across the district."This is a

nodes.title: Oakridge High Wins State STEM Excellence Award

body.processed:
Oakridge High School has been named a State STEM School of Excellence for 2026, recognizing the school's outstanding integration of science, technology, engineering, and mathematics across all subject areas.

The award highlights the district's investment in state-of-the-art lab equipment, teacher professional development, and partnerships with local tech companies.
body.summary: Oakridge High School has been named a State STEM School of Excellence for 2026, recognizing the school's outstanding integration of science, technology, engineering, and mathematics across all subject

body.processed:
The Oakridge Eagles boys basketball team captured the state championship title with a thrilling 72-68 victory in the finals. This marks the school's first state basketball title in 15 years.

Head Coach Marcus Johnson praised his team's dedication and hard work throughout the season. "These young men showed incredible character and resilience. This championship belongs to the entire Oakridge community."
body.summary: The Oakridge Eagles boys basketball team captured the state championship title with a thrilling 72-68 victory in the finals. This marks the school's first state basketball title in 15 years.Head Coach
